T-003's remediated Done When (7 composite bullets, tasks.md:640-692) preserves every TEST/AC ID from round 1 (TEST-005/006/007/008/009/010/011/016/018/019/020/021 with AC-005/006/007/008/009/010/011/016/018/019/020/021) and each sub-clause still names a concrete, inspectable outcome (exit codes, invocation counts, hash/marker matches, file existence, implementation-report/quality-gate artifacts) rather than a vague verb -- grep for 'ensure|consider|works correctly|verify is correct' across all three tasks' Done When sections returned zero matches.
